description: Fix stale JSDoc in tenantTiers.ts — replace 'basic' references with 'pro'
Fix buildPhaseItems to use tenant's actual tier prices for scheduled reductions
Verify/add assertTierAccess(INVOICE_DESIGNER) in saveInvoiceTemplate server action
Extract shared plan-fetching logic in nextAuthOptions.ts into reusable helper
Add console.warn in tierFromStripeProduct() for unknown product names
Replace TierGate null loading state with skeleton placeholder
Migration: add FK from stripe_subscriptions.stripe_base_price_id to stripe_prices
Add JSDoc to addOns.ts marking it as intentional scaffolding
Create docs/tier-gating-guide.md with step-by-step instructions for adding new gated features
Guide covers: add to TIER_FEATURES enum, TIER_FEATURE_MAP, FEATURE_MINIMUM_TIER
Guide covers: client gating with TierGate/useTierFeature, server gating with ServerTierGate/assertTierAccess
Guide covers: adding display name in FEATURE_DISPLAY_NAMES, CE bypass behavior, testing
Add annual price env vars to .env.example (PRO_BASE_ANNUAL, PRO_USER_ANNUAL, PREMIUM_BASE_ANNUAL, PREMIUM_USER_ANNUAL)
StripeService config reads annual price IDs from env
Migration: add billing_interval column to stripe_subscriptions (default 'month')
Subscription import/create tracks billing_interval from Stripe price recurring.interval
createLicenseCheckoutSession accepts interval param, uses annual price IDs when 'year'
Account page shows monthly/annual toggle with savings callout and confirmation dialog
Switching billing interval schedules change at period end via Stripe subscription schedule
upgradeTier() accepts interval parameter and uses correct annual/monthly prices
getUpgradePreview() shows both monthly and annual pricing options
Add trial_end and subscription_status to JWT token type
Fetch trial_end and subscription_status from DB on sign-in and refresh (5-min throttle)
Propagate trial_end and subscription_status from JWT to Session.user
Add isTrialing, trialDaysLeft, trialEndDate, subscriptionStatus to TierContextValue
Add isPaymentFailed derived from subscriptionStatus in TierContext
Modify checkout session to support trial_period_days param for new signups
TrialBanner component: shows '{Plan} Trial: {N} days left' in header, left of tenant badge
TrialBanner uses warning color when ≤3 days remaining
TrialBanner links to /msp/account
PaymentFailedBanner component: shows error banner when past_due/unpaid, links to billing portal
PaymentFailedBanner is not dismissible and replaces TrialBanner if both apply
Account page: Trial Status card with days remaining, progress bar, start/end dates
Account page: CTA varies by trial state — shows upcoming charge amount/date, cancel option for Premium trial, update payment for failures
handleSubscriptionUpdated webhook correctly processes trialing status (sets plan)
Payment failure at trial end triggers past_due status and payment banner
startPremiumTrial in StripeService: admin action that sets 30-day Premium trial on tenant
startPremiumTrial for paying Pro: upgrades subscription to Premium with trial_end 30 days
startPremiumTrial for Pro trial: ends Pro trial first, then creates Premium trial
startPremiumTrial rejects tenants already on Premium
startPremiumTrial updates tenants.plan to 'premium'
Premium trial auto-charges at end: Stripe charges for Premium, webhook confirms trialing→active, plan stays 'premium'
Cancel Premium Trial button on account page
Premium trial charge failure: webhook handles past_due, payment failure banner shows
Premium trial request form: textarea in Account Management Plan & Tier section
Premium trial request form shown when isPro and not trialing
sendPremiumTrialRequestAction sends email to Nine Minds with tenant info + message
NineMinds extension: Trial Requests handled via email to support (no separate list view needed)
NineMinds extension: 'Start Premium Trial' action button per tenant in dropdown menu
NineMinds extension: API endpoint POST /api/v1/tenant-management/start-premium-trial
NineMinds extension: show current plan and subscription status per tenant in list
Payment failure banner in header when subscription_status is past_due or unpaid
handleSubscriptionUpdated logs payment failure status (past_due/unpaid)
